prompt: Convert all the text on the books into the font of the second image. Finally, let the alien baby hold the books you have just converted.
prompt_refined: Edit the image of the books (Image 1). First, replace all existing text on the book covers and spines in Image 1 (including titles like 'QUANTUM PHYSICS', 'for babies', and author names like 'Chris Ferrie') with the font style demonstrated in Image 2. After this textual modification, compose a scene where the alien baby from Image 3 is holding the updated stack of books. Position the alien baby prominently, centrally in the frame, with its tentacles or hands visibly cradling the books, ensuring the newly font-styled titles are clearly legible.
objects: Text on book covers and spines (in the font style of Image 2)
Alien baby centrally positioned in the frame
The alien baby holding the stack of books
Existing text on book covers and spines from Image 1 (should not be present)
